creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
Marcelo Araujo wrote:
> Hi Philip,
> 
> The last patch isn't applied well, You need to make more tests before
> send to me this.
> Please you should get the last revision of devel/viewvc into CVS and try
> to apply this patch again!
> 
> Regards,
> 
Sure it does: (I'd wagger, you were in the wrong directory when you 
applied it ?)

$ cd ~
$ fetch -o 121883.diff \
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?prp=121883-2-diff&n=/patch-2.diff

$ cd /space/portstrees/FreeBSD/ports
$ rm -rf KNOBS devel/viewvc
$ cvs up -dP -C KNOBS devel/viewvc
$ patch < ~/121883.diff

Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: KNOBS
|===================================================================
|RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/KNOBS,v
|retrieving revision 1.26
|diff -u -r1.26 KNOBS
|--- KNOBS      27 Mar 2008 00:05:09 -0000      1.26
|+++ KNOBS      27 Mar 2008 04:11:11 -0000
--------------------------
Patching file KNOBS using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 72.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: devel/viewvc/Makefile
|===================================================================
|RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/devel/viewvc/Makefile,v
|retrieving revision 1.25
|diff -u -r1.25 Makefile
|--- devel/viewvc/Makefile      11 Apr 2007 10:37:04 -0000      1.25
|+++ devel/viewvc/Makefile      31 Mar 2008 23:56:28 -0000
--------------------------
Patching file devel/viewvc/Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 6.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 32.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: devel/viewvc/distinfo
|===================================================================
|RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/devel/viewvc/distinfo,v
|retrieving revision 1.14
|diff -u -r1.14 distinfo
|--- devel/viewvc/distinfo      11 Apr 2007 10:37:04 -0000      1.14
|+++ devel/viewvc/distinfo      31 Mar 2008 13:33:05 -0000
--------------------------
Patching file devel/viewvc/distinfo using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: devel/viewvc/pkg-plist
|===================================================================
|RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/devel/viewvc/pkg-plist,v
|retrieving revision 1.8
|diff -u -r1.8 pkg-plist
|--- devel/viewvc/pkg-plist     11 Apr 2007 10:37:05 -0000      1.8
|+++ devel/viewvc/pkg-plist     31 Mar 2008 23:45:21 -0000
--------------------------
Patching file devel/viewvc/pkg-plist using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 122.
Hmm...  Ignoring the trailing garbage.
done
